character.definition: to make a fool of; idiotic, simple, stupid
(non-classical form of 妞) a girl; a little girl
(same as non-classical form of 㻬) a kind of jade
(ancient form of 討) to quell (uprising, rebellion, etc.) to punish (another nation, etc.) by force of arms, sound; voice; tone
a large earthen pot for cooking, a large iron cauldron used to cook in old times
trust to, rely on, appoint; to bear, duty, office; allow
leather thong wound around the handle of a sword
